intended_use: AutoDensity is a post-processing software intended to estimate spine Bone Mineral Density (BMD) from EOSedge dual energy images for orthopedic pre-surgical assessment applications. It is an opportunis
intended_use_full: AutoDensity is a post-processing software intended to estimate spine Bone Mineral Density (BMD) from EOSedge dual energy images for orthopedic pre-surgical assessment applications. It is an opportunistic tool that enables immediate assessment of bone density from EOSedge images acquired for other purposes.
target_condition: Suspected low bone mineral density in patients undergoing orthopedic surgical planning; orthopedic pre-surgical assessment applications
ground_truth: Ground truth ROI detection and vertebral level identification established by two trained technologists under supervision of a senior US board-certified radiologist using 3-truther majority voting principle with expert adjudication as gold standard
other_metrics: Vertebral Level Identification Accuracy: ≥90% of levels correctly identified; Spine ROI Accuracy (Dice Coefficient): lower boundary of 95% CI ≥0.80; BMD precision CV%: 2.23% [95% CI: 1.78%, 2.98%]; Bland-Altman bias: 0.045 g/cm² with limits of agreement [-0.088 g/cm², 0.178 g/cm²]; BMD difference maximum 0.057 g/cm² for high BMD phantom
